content:
Would it be possible to request an additional version of OST1, Track 9, to be available in-game, without the first 10 seconds? The goal would be to use it as a BGM track for the lobby. Right now, using this track as BGM will play the initial fanfare every time, and it takes a while to wait for the main song to start playing.

This track: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1229391410453680138/1229392905551085618

The first 10 seconds of the song is very distinct and separate from the main song track, so I would like to suggest that a different version of the song to be added without that first 10 seconds. This way, the track can be used for BGM in the lobby much more effectively.
